title: Trending song "Trump Trump Baby" features Amber Rose
shortDescription: Rap song "Trump Trump Baby" featuring model Amber Rose is a hit at the RNC

title: 'Maxwell Yearick' wasn't shooter at Trump campaign rally | Fact check
shortDescription: The suspect in the attempted assassination of Trump is Thomas Matthew Crooks, not Maxwell Yearick.

title: What we know: Can VP picks help win elections?
shortDescription: Donald Trump has selected JD Vance - who is 40 years his junior - to be his running mate. Will this pick help or hurt his odds? Here's what we know.

title: Will JD Vance's religious background sway Catholic voters?
shortDescription: Religious experts told USA TODAY that it is unlikely Vance’s religious background will sway Catholic voters.

title: Rep. Adam Schiff calls for Biden to drop out of 2024 presidential race
shortDescription: Schiff, of California is one of the most prominent Democratic lawmakers to call on Biden to make way for a stronger candidate.

title: Biden says 'time to outlaw' AR-15 after Trump assassination attempt
shortDescription: President Joe Biden at first stayed quiet about guns after the attempt on Donald Trump's life, but on Tuesday he renewed calls for action.

title: RNC Day 3 speakers: JD Vance, Donald Trump Jr. set to take the stage
shortDescription: The third day of the Republican National Convention focuses on the theme "Make America Strong Again." Here's a look at the speaker lineup.

title: What's Mike Johnson's religion? House Speaker is Southern Baptist
shortDescription: Speaker Mike Johnson and former speaker Rep. Kevin McCarthy share the same religious faith.

title: Vance, Trump backing different candidates in AZ race
shortDescription: Here's who Donald Trump and JD Vance are backing in the GOP race to replace the retiring Rep. Debbie Lesko, R-Ariz.

title: Democrats to hold off nominating President Biden virtually this month
shortDescription: Democrats won't nominate President Joe Biden as their nominee this month but still intend to virtually before Aug. 7 ahead of the DNC convention.

title: Iran denies seeking to kill Trump to avenge general's death
shortDescription: Iran's mission to the U.N. said in a statement that Trump remains a criminal who must be prosecuted and punished in a court of law.

title: Trump assassination attempt prompts conspiracy theories online and off
shortDescription: Researchers say they aren't surprised to see conspiracy theories spring up after the Trump rally shooting.

title: Trump shooter had little time, left little trace of deadly plot
shortDescription: In an increasingly online world, Thomas Matthew Crooks, 20, seems to have stayed hidden while devising a plan to murder a former U.S. president.
